descMenu: Orders, waiter requests and digital menu management
descTables: Table overview, reservations and capacity management
descHr: Schedules, attendance, payroll and staff reports
descGuests: Guest records, VIP list, visit history and spending
descAnalytics: Revenue, best-selling dishes and busiest hours
descHotel: Rooms, reservations, front desk and folio system
cpSubtitle: Overview and quick access to all modules
cpStaffPortalDesc: Share the link and QR code with your staff
cpKpiHint: Pick which metrics to show on the dashboard.
vertManageSub: HR, inventory, guests and analytics — shared by restaurant and hotel
annDesc: Platform announcements and staff bulletin board
addBusinessSub: Expand your account with a new vertical
supportDesc: Questions and help from the rest.by.me team
kdEmptyBarActive: No active orders for the bar.
wReject1: Sorry, this item is currently unavailable.
wReject2: The kitchen is busy, please try again shortly.
wReject3: The order was received by mistake, please order again.
wReject4: The restaurant is closing, ordering is not possible.
wdGuestNotIn: Guest is not checked into the room.
amSubtitle: Manage digital menu categories and items.
amConfirmDeleteCatItems: Delete category "{{name}}"? This will also delete {{count}} items in it. This action cannot be undone.
amStep3Desc: Guests can scan the QR code
libBtnHint: The library holds ready-made items you add to your offering in one click — no manual entry.
rlpSub: Import ready-made items into your menu
rlpAddonYes: You have Inventory Pro — each item also creates ingredients + a recipe (stock is deducted automatically).
rlpAddonNo: Menu items are imported. With Inventory Pro, recipes/stock would be created automatically too.
rlpDisclaimer: Calories are summed from the recipe ingredients (an estimate; bottled/ready drinks per a standard serving), and allergens are derived from ingredients as a starting point. Values depend on your recipe and serving — review and adjust after importing (edit the item).
agpEmptyDesc: Add the first guest or wait for online registrations
gpfNoActivities: No activities for the selected period
gpfNoOrders: No orders linked to this guest.
gpfOrdersAutoLink: Orders are linked automatically when a guest charges to their room (folio).
gpfNoHotelPeriod: No stays for the selected period
gpfNoSpaPeriod: No treatments for the selected period
gpfHasAccountSub: Can log in and view reservations
gpfNoAccountSub: The guest can register on the reservations page — you will see the request in the "Pending" list
amDragHint: Drag the category pills to reorder them — the same order is shown to guests on the digital menu.
amCatNotePlaceholder: Internal note (visible to staff only, not guests) — e.g. instructions for bar/kitchen
amBarCategoryHint: Items in this category go to the Bar dashboard, not the Kitchen
amQrNote: Print the QR code and stick it on every table. Guests scan it and the menu opens instantly on their phone.
amItemIconHint: (shown on the menu when there's no image)
bmSubtitle: A group of items at a lower price together.
bmEmpty: No bundles yet. Create a combo offer with a discount.
paSubtitle: Banner ads on your public menu.
paEmpty: No ads yet. Add a partner banner.
amWaiterMsgHint: Guests choose one of these messages when calling a waiter.
amAnalyticsSubtitle: Overview of items, categories and digital menu status.
amQrPageSubtitle: Share the link or print the QR code for tables.
amQrNoteLong: Print the QR code and stick it on every table. Guests scan it and the menu opens instantly on their phone, no app install needed.
msWaiterHintDrag: Guests choose one of these messages when calling a waiter. Drag to reorder.
msRejectHint: The waiter picks one of these messages when rejecting an order. The guest sees it on the tracker. Drag to reorder.
msBookingDesc: A floating "Book" button on the menu that leads to the booking page.
msSubtitle: Manage the digital menu, visibility and messages.
msDescPlaceholder: A short restaurant description that guests see in the menu...
msDescHint: Shown below the restaurant name in the guest menu. Max 200 characters.
msQrSessionHint: After it expires, the guest must scan the QR code again to order and call a waiter.
msVisDesc: For each option choose who can see it in the guest menu
msVisOrderingDesc: Who can order from the menu
msVisRegistrationDesc: Who sees the Become our guest and Log in buttons
msVisHotelDesc: Who sees the link to the hotel page in the menu
msVisSpaDesc: Who sees the link to the spa booking page in the menu
msBookingToggleDesc: Online booking button shown on the guest page
tsSubtitle: Choose the visual style of the guest menu. The change is visible to guests immediately.
gsSubtitle: Basic venue info visible to guests.
gsCurrencySub: The currency used to display prices and charge payments. Changing it does NOT convert existing prices — only the symbol changes, so re-enter your price list if needed. Issued invoices keep their currency.
gsBusinessSub: Tax ID, VAT number and bank account (IBAN) — shown on fiscal invoices. You can add these later too.
gsBankHint: You can add multiple accounts. The primary one (★) appears on invoices.
fiskSubtitle: Universal invoices with VAT calculation. The tax-authority connection (ME and region) is enabled per country.
fiskBusinessMissing: Tax ID and VAT number are required for fiscal invoices.
fiskRatesHint: Rates the system uses to calculate VAT (per country). Managed by the superadmin.
fiskRatesEditHint: VAT rates for your property. By default the country rates are used; you can add, edit or remove rates. The key (e.g. STANDARD) is referenced by items during classification.
fiskRateResetConfirm: Reset to country rates? Your custom rates will be deleted.
fiskRateUsedWarn: Rate „{{key}}“ is used by {{n}} items — they will fall back to 0% VAT. Remove anyway?
fiskRateInvalid: Check rates: key is required and value must be a number ≥ 0.
fiskRatesEmpty: No rates defined for this country.
fiskClassifyHint: Assigning a tax rate to dishes, services and items. Until set, 0% is used.
fiskInvoicesHint: Overview of issued invoices with VAT breakdown and numbering.
fiskStornoConfirm: Void invoice {{n}}? The original stays on record; a corrective invoice is created.
fiskSplitMinGroups: Assign items to at least 2 invoices.
fiskSplitHelpItems: Assign each item to an invoice (buttons 1, 2, …). Each group becomes a separate invoice. If the invoice is already issued, void it first in the „Invoices“ list, then split it here.
fiskSplitHelpEqual: The total is divided into equal shares — each guest gets their own invoice for the same amount. If the invoice is already issued, void it first, then split.
fiskUnbilledHint: Recent orders, folios and spa appointments without an invoice. Issue anytime — nothing is lost.
fiskNotFiscalizedNote: Invoice not yet fiscalized with the tax authority (IIC/FIC/QR follow with fiscalization).
fiskProviderHint: Per-country fiscalization (Montenegro — Fisver): IIC/FIC/QR on the invoice. Provider and certificate configuration.
rmManageSub: Announcements of upcoming development — visible to all users on the dashboard (they can't dismiss them).
rmMasterHint: Master switch — when off, “What we're building” is hidden from everyone on the dashboard. Individual items stay untouched.
thSubtitle: Choose the admin panel color palette. The theme is applied immediately after saving. Switch light/dark mode with the ☀️/🌙 button in the top bar — it works with every palette.
thLangSubtitle: The main admin panel language for the whole account. Anyone on the team can temporarily change the language for their session via the top bar selector — this is the default.
bsSubtitle: Your venue's logo and brand color — a unique visual identity. Used on the staff portal, QR codes and email messages, and can also be applied to the admin theme and menu.
bsColorDesc: Your brand's main color. Pick it as a color or enter a hex.
bsApplyBrandDesc: Use the brand color as a starting point for the admin theme and menu appearance. Everything remains manually changeable later (Settings → Theme, Menu → Templates).
bsAdminThemeDesc: Generates the admin panel palette (light + dark) from the brand color.
bsMenuDesc: Sets the "Brand" template — menu colors are derived from the brand color.
bsAdminApplied: ✓ Admin theme synced with brand. (Changeable in Settings → Theme.)
bsMenuApplied: ✓ Menu synced — "Brand" template (colors from brand). (Changeable in Menu → Templates.)
luSubtitle: The logo is shown in the guest menu and admin panel. Recommended format: square, min 200×200px.
luPreviewBadge: Preview of new logo — not saved yet
luClickDrop: Click or drag a file here
luSaved: Logo saved and immediately visible to guests!
luGuestMenuDesc: Circle in the menu header that guests see on their phone
luAdminPanelDesc: Square next to the restaurant name in the sidebar and header
luEmailNotifDesc: Included in email messages sent by the system
luTip4: The logo adapts to size automatically
bpSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your venue.
bpBetaDesc: During the beta period all modules are free. Plans and billing will be available when the beta period ends.
bpComplimentaryDesc: Your account has free access activated with all features.
bpSuspended: The account is suspended. Renew your subscription to keep using RestByMe.
bpExpired: The trial has expired. Choose a plan to continue with all features.
bpAnnualNote: The annual plan is billed once. You get 2.4 months free.
bpDowngradeContact: To downgrade, contact support at support@restby.me
bpEnterpriseDesc: Multiple venues, channel manager (Beds24), portfolio dashboard, brand templates. For hotel chains and portfolios of 3+ venues.
bpFaq1Q: Can I change my plan at any time?
bpFaq1A: Yes, upgrades are instant. For a downgrade, contact support.
bpFaq2Q: What happens to my data if I change plan?
bpFaq2A: Data is never deleted. If you upgrade, you immediately get access to the new modules.
bpFaq3Q: What's the difference between monthly and annual?
bpFaq3A: The annual plan costs {{percent}}% less — like getting 2.4 months free. Billed once per year.
bpFaq4A: Yes, at any time. The plan stays active until the end of the paid period.
rleHeroD: Title section with a background image and CTA button
rleStoryD: Short restaurant description with an optional photo
rleMenuPreviewD: Automatically shows menu categories with a link to the digital menu
rleGalleryD: Grid of restaurant and dish photos
rleCtaBannerD: Promotional strip with a call to action
rleHoursLocD: Address, opening hours and optional Google Maps embed
rleReservationD: CTA block with a call to reserve a table
rleMapsHint: Google Maps → Share → Embed a map → copy the URL from src="…"
rleSubtitle: Edit blocks and watch changes in real time
rleAutoNote: This block automatically generates content from the database.
rleSeoDescLabel: SEO description (meta description, up to 160 characters)
rleSeoDescPh: A short restaurant description for search engines...
htNoTypes: No room types. Add the first type so you can create rooms.
htRoomNumberExists: A room with that number already exists
htRoomDeleteConfirm: Delete this room? This action cannot be undone.
htCheckoutAfterCheckin: Check-out must be after check-in date
htResConfirmedEmailSent: Reservation confirmed — confirmation email sent to guest
htResConfirmedEmailFail: Reservation confirmed, but email not sent (check Resend settings)
htResConfirmedEmailFailShort: Reservation confirmed, but email not sent
htNoReservationsPeriod: No reservations for the selected period.
htNoRoomsCalendar: No rooms. Add rooms in room management.
htNoArrivals: No arrivals for the selected period.
htNoDepartures: No departures for the selected period.
htCheckoutSuccess: {{name}} — check-out successful. Room set to cleaning.
htBlacklistWarn:
⚠️ WARNING: {{name}} is on the BLACKLIST!

Continue with check-in?
htGuestsCrmSub: CRM — view and manage guest profiles
htNoGuests: No guests recorded yet. Guests are added automatically on first reservation.
htBreakfastSub: Record of included breakfasts per room · planned vs used
htNoBreakfastRooms: No rooms with breakfast included for this day. (Enable breakfast on the rate plan: Hotel → Rate plans.)
htMinibarSub: Minibar price list — charge goes to guest folio
htNoMinibarItems: No items. Add the first one (e.g. Water, Juice, Beer).
htAuditAlreadyRun: Audit for that day already done — showing existing report
htNightAuditSub: End of day (EOD) — room charges to folios, housekeeping reset, daily report
htAuditAutoNote: Runs automatically every night. Manual run is idempotent — re-running the same day does not add duplicate items.
htSeoDescPh: Short hotel description for search engines...
hlHeroD: Title section with background image and CTA button
hlAboutD: Short hotel description with optional photo
hlRoomsD: Automatically shows accommodation types from the database
hlAmenitiesD: List of hotel amenities (pool, parking, WiFi...)
hlCtaBannerD: Promotional strip with a call to action
hlLocationD: Hotel address and optional Google Maps embed
hlHMaps: Google Maps → Share → Embed a map → copy the URL from src="…"
hlContactD: Phone, email and reception working hours
htBookingSettingsSub: Booking page, custom domain and QR code for reception
htShowFloatingBtn: Show floating button on the menu
htShowFloatingHint: Guests will see a "Book accommodation" button in the menu
htChargeFull: Charge total booked (regardless of early departure)
htEarlyDepartureHint: Determines whether nights not stayed are removed from the folio on check-out before the booked date.
htModeImmediateD: The reservation is confirmed immediately on submission. The guest gets a confirmation email instantly.
htModeManualD: The reservation goes on hold. You approve it manually from the admin panel; the guest gets confirmation only then.
htDomainHowTo: How to set up a custom domain?
htDnsStep1: Add a CNAME record at your DNS provider:
htDnsStep3: Save the domain above and send it to us — we'll activate SSL.
htPrintHint: Print and place it at reception or in the room. Guests scan and can immediately book their next stay.
psMonriKeyHint: Monri/Payten Dashboard → API settings → "Key". Used for the digital signature (digest). Secret — do not share.
psAuthTokenHint: Monri Dashboard → API settings → "Authenticity token" (merchant identifier).
psDeleteConfirm: Delete the provider configuration? All credentials will be deleted.
psSubtitle: Payment provider configuration for online guest charges (booking, folio).
psHowItWorksBody: Every provider you activate and set as default will be used for online guest charges. Set Test mode for trial testing, Live for real payments. Credentials are stored encrypted and not visible even to the admin.
psNoProvidersDesc: Add Stripe or Monri to enable online payments.
psCredsMissing: Credentials not set — provider cannot process payments
psLiveWarning: ⚠ Live mode charges real transactions. Check that the credentials are correct.
psCredsSecurity: 🔒 Credentials are encrypted on save and not visible even to the administrator.
psMonriStep1: In the Monri/bank dashboard open API settings.
psMonriStep2: Copy the "Key" (secret signing key) and "Authenticity token" (merchant identifier) into the fields below.
psMonriStep3: Start in Test mode (test cards), then switch to Live when everything works.
psStripeStep1: In the Stripe Dashboard open Developers → API keys (Secret key) and Webhooks (Signing secret).
psStripeStep2: Test keys start with sk_test_, live with sk_live_.
psCallbackUrl: Callback / Webhook URL — paste it into the {{provider}} dashboard:
psCallbackNoteMonri: Monri sends the payment confirmation (callback) to this URL. Without it, the reservation/folio won't be marked paid automatically.
psCallbackNoteStripe: Stripe sends webhook events to this URL. Enter the Signing secret from that webhook above.
rplOverlapWarn: Warning: Overlap with "{{name}}". The higher multiplier will apply.
rplSubtitle: Packages per room type and seasonal multipliers
rplSeasonalHint: Multiplier 1.3 = all prices +30% for the selected period. Applies to base_price and all packages.
rplLimitRoomsHint: If no room is selected, the plan applies to all rooms of the type. If the selected rooms are all occupied — the plan is not offered for online booking.
rplNoPackages: No packages. Add "Room only", "With breakfast" etc. per room type.
rplSeasonalMultHint: Hotel-wide — applies to all rooms and packages
rplNoSeasonalMult: No seasonal multipliers. Without multipliers, base prices are used.
rvTimeoutSub: Supabase did not respond in time. Check the connection or try a shorter period.
rvUnexpectedErr: Unexpected error. Check the console for details.
rvSuggestionsSub: The algorithm analyzes current occupancy and recommends corrections. Applying creates a seasonal rate in the active plan.
rvNoSuggestions: No suggestions — prices are optimal for the next 14 days, or there isn't enough data.
flPaymentReceived: Payment received! The folio has been updated.
flCloseConfirm: Close the folio? This marks the stay as completed and paid.
flRefundConfirm: Refund €{{amt}}? This is an irreversible action.
flNoFolio: No folio created for this reservation. Check-in creates the folio automatically.
flNoMinibarItems: No items. Add them in Hotel → Minibar.
flNoRetail: No products in stock. Add them in Spa → Retail.
hkpReqCreated: Request created — room set to maintenance
hkpNoTasksPeriod: No tasks for the selected period.
hkppNotStaff: You were not found as staff of this property.
hkppNoTasksToday: You have no tasks for today.
stfEmailExists: An employee with this email already exists.
stfNoStaffDesc: Add your first employee to start using the HR module
attSubtitle: Record of arrivals, departures and staff working hours.
schCopyConfirm: Copy the schedule from the previous week?
schNoPrevWeek: No schedule in the previous week.
schSubtitle: Planning and overview of staff shifts.
paySubtitle: Manage staff wages, bonuses and deductions.
payNoEntries: No entries for the selected period.
spiSubtitle: One portal for all employees — content adapts to the role (waiter, housekeeper, reception, spa therapist…)
spiQrHint: Print and post it in a visible spot — service area, kitchen, reception.
spiQrDesc: The employee scans the QR code → the portal login page opens → they log in with email/password.
spiStep1Desc: In the Staff module → add an employee with email and password.
spiStep2Desc: The employee opens {{url}} on their phone or computer.
spiStep3Desc: The employee logs in with the email and password you assigned them.
spiStep4Desc: The employee sees their schedule, attendance, pay and absences — read-only.
spiReadOnly: The employee cannot change any data — everything is read-only.
hrrNoShifts: No scheduled shifts in this period.
hrrSubtitle: Detailed report of attendance, lateness and labor costs.
hrrNoData: No data for the selected period.
sppNotEmployee: You are not an employee of this restaurant or the account is inactive.
profSelectRoles: Select all roles this employee should see in the portal (can be multiple).
profGeneratePayslipTitle: Generate payslip for the selected period
invSubtitle: Manage stock items, quantities and minimum levels.
ingDesc: Define which ingredients are used for each menu item. When an order is received, stock is deducted automatically.
ingSelectToEdit: Select a menu item to edit its recipe
ingNoIngredients: No ingredients defined for this item.
ingAllAdded: All inventory ingredients have been added to the recipe.
ingEmptyInventory: Inventory is empty. Add ingredients in
mlSubtitle: History of inventory inflows, outflows and adjustments.
iaSubtitle: Overview of inventory, value and changes over the last 30 days.
spaNoApptsPeriod: No appointments for the selected period
spaSetSubtitle: Working hours, cancellation policy and notifications
spaSetMinAdvanceHint: Guest must book at least X hours in advance
spaSetFreeCancelHint: Free cancellation X hours before appointment
spaSetReminderLabel: Send reminder X hours before appointment
spaSetReminderHint: An automatic email reminder is sent to guests
spaRoomsSubtitle: Rooms and capacity of the spa center
spaNoRooms: No rooms. Add the first room.
spaTherapistsSubtitle: Therapist profiles and treatments they can perform
spaBioPh: Short description of the therapist's experience...
spaNoTherapists: No therapists. Add the first therapist from staff.
spaRetSubtitle: Products for sale to guests (to folio or cash)
spaNoProducts: No products. Add the first one for sale to guests.
spaLibDesc: Import a ready treatment into your catalog (refine price and details later).
spaNoTreatments: No treatments. Create the first one.
spaPkgSubtitle: Combine accommodation and treatments into attractive offers
spaIncludePh: E.g. 2 nights in a Deluxe room, Aromatherapy massage...
spaAddItemsHint: Add the items the package includes.
spaNoPackages: No packages. Create the first spa package.
spaApptSubtitle: Overview and management of spa appointments
spaFillRequired: Fill in the required fields (treatment, date, time, guest name)
anaMatrixStarDesc: High popularity + high margin → Keep and promote
anaMatrixPlowDesc: High popularity + low margin → Raise price or cut cost
anaMatrixPuzzleDesc: Low popularity + high margin → Position better on the menu
anaMatrixDogDesc: Low popularity + low margin → Consider removing
anaMenuMatrixTitle: Menu Engineering matrix (Plow Horse / Star / Dog / Puzzle)
anaMenuMatrixDesc: The matrix categorizes dishes by popularity (sales count) and margin (profitability). Only dishes with defined recipes.
anaNoRecipesWarn1: No dishes with defined recipes. Define recipes in the
anaDishesNoRecipe: {{count}} dishes have no defined recipe and are not included in the matrix:
anaItemsNoConsumption: {{count}} items with no consumption in period
anaNoDataRecipes: No data — define recipes in the Inventory module.
anaNoInflows: No inflows in the selected period.
anaNoManualOut: No manual outflows in the selected period.
anaFrozenNoConsumption: Frozen capital — items with no consumption
anaFrozenDesc: Ingredients in stock that were not used in the selected period.
anaConsumptionSpeedDesc: Based on average daily consumption in the period.
anaNoActiveStaff: No active staff. Add employees in the Staff module.
anaManualLaborNote1: Or define employee wages in the
anaManualLaborNote2: module (edit employee → wage type and amount).
tanSubtitle: Overview of capacity, reservations and occupancy over the last 30 days.
wmvCloseConfirm: Close table {{n}}? All active orders will be marked as completed.
tmeCantDeleteActive: You can't delete the active layout — activate another one first.
tmeCantDeleteLast: You can't delete the last layout.
tmeDeleteLayoutConfirm: Delete layout "{{name}}" and all its tables?
wmvNoMyTables: You have no tables assigned for today.
tasSubtitle: Pick a waiter for each table on the selected date.
tasNoTables: No tables in the active layout.
tasNoWaiters: No waiters. Add staff with the “View tables” permission.
tasNoPermission: You don't have permission to manage table assignments.
evNoPermission: You don't have permission to view events.
albActiveNonStandard: Active table layout: {{name}} — not the standard one.
evSubtitle: Weddings, parties and banquets — table layout and guest list.
edDeleteConfirm: Delete event “{{name}}” and all its guests?
edNoLayout: This event has no table layout linked.
edSelectTableHint: Click a table to seat guests.
tmeAddHint: Click the canvas to add a {{shape}} table
tmeEditModeHint: Drag the table · tap outside to exit
tmeClickToEdit: Click a table to edit details
resPickerEmpty: No tables defined. Add them in the Table map.
resSubtitle: Overview and management of table reservations.
resManageHint: Enabled in Menu Settings → Visibility (Online reservation).
resOnlineDesc: When enabled, guests can send reservation requests via the restaurant link. Each request must be approved or rejected manually.
resNoResFilters: No reservations for the selected filters.
resSelectTableMap: Select a table on the map
resCalHint: Click a day to see the list
saNoAccess: You don't have access to this page.
saLibTranslateHint: AI-translate library names into all 7 languages — centrally, once (admins see them in their language when importing).
saFaqSub: Frequently asked questions admins see on the Support page
saQuestionPh: e.g. How do I close a folio?
saNoQuestions: No questions yet. Add the first one.
saAnnDeleteConfirm: Delete announcement? It will disappear for all admins.
saDeleteConfirm: Permanently delete this conversation? Messages can't be recovered.
saMinSub: Predefined items tenants import into their minibar
saSpaSub: Predefined spa treatments tenants import into their catalog
saImageUrlPh: https://... (also filled by the Pexels script)
saNutSub: kcal per unit + allergens — used by "Recalculate" in the recipe library
saIngredientNamePh: e.g. lime (lowercase, as written in the recipe)
saIngredientHint: Must exactly match the name in the recipe ingredients (lowercase).
rlRemoveImgConfirm: Remove image for "{{name}}"? It reverts to the emoji icon.
rlDeleteConfirm:
Delete recipe "{{name}}" from the library? Ingredients are deleted too.

Does not affect items tenants have already imported.
rlIdInvalid: ID may contain only lowercase letters, numbers and _.
rlRecomputeBtn: Recalculate calories and allergens from ingredients
rlRecomputeHint: Fills the fields above based on ingredients; check before saving.
rlNoIngs: No ingredients. Items without ingredients are imported only as a menu item.
tpGenerated: ✓ Shades generated from the base color. You can fine-tune individual tokens manually.
tpSaved: ✓ Saved. (Refresh the page to apply everywhere.)
tpDeleteConfirm: Delete palette? Tenants using it revert to green.
tpDesc: Define brand colors (primary family + sidebar) for light and dark mode. The rest (text, backgrounds, danger/warning/...) inherit verified defaults. Built-in palettes (Green/Blue/Purple) can be edited or reset to default. You assign palettes to tenants in the tenant editor (→ Theme).
tpGenerateHint: Fills all 7 tokens (light and dark mode) with shades derived from the base color. You can still fine-tune each token manually below.
sroleNoneDesc: Roles define what each employee can see and do in the app. Start from a template or create your own role.
srolePermDesc: Select what an employee with this role can see and do.
sroleAssignedAlert: This role is assigned to {{count}} employee(s). First change the role in HR → Employees.
bcSub: Plan and addon prices · beta-free switches
bcBetaDescPost: use all modules for free (limited only by selected verticals). The paywall is not shown.
bcBetaActiveWarn: ⚠️ Beta is ACTIVE — billing is currently disabled for everyone.
bcBetaNotePh: e.g. Beta period until end of July 2026
bcPlansSub: Quick price/active changes in the table; "Edit" for description, features and included modules.
bcBetaFreeDesc: = free during beta (independent of the global switch).
bcRestrictedDesc: = global beta does NOT unlock it; only tenants you grant it to (Addon Override) see it.
bcProviderTitle: 💳 Purchase (Level B) — leave empty until the product is created at the provider
sapApprovalOnDesc: New accounts wait for your approval before they become active and visible.
sapApprovalOffDesc: New accounts go live immediately after registration, with no approval needed.
sapApprovalOnSaved: Enabled — new registrations wait for approval.
sapApprovalOffSaved: Disabled — new registrations are active immediately.
sapCompActive: Active — the user has full Pro access for free
sapReasonPh: e.g. Beta tester, Partner restaurant, Bonus period...
sapReasonHint: The note is visible to the user on the Billing page.
sapBrandTitle: Derived from the tenant's brand color
sapRestrictedHint: Global beta does not unlock it — grant it here so this tenant can see it.
sapVerticalsHint: Which verticals the tenant uses. Restaurant is the base and is always on.
sapNoExpiryHint: Leave empty if there is no expiry date.
sapAddonHint: Enabled addons will be available to the tenant for free, regardless of the plan. Useful for testing and beta access to individual modules.
sapPasswordHint: Set a new password for this account's owner. The user can sign in with the new password immediately.
sapPwdTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
audSubSuper: All platform activity — filter by tenant, user and action.
sapSuspendConfirm: Suspend account "{{name}}"? The user will not be able to access the admin panel.
sapApproveConfirm: Approve account "{{name}}"? The owner gets an email notification. The owner gets access, the page becomes active.
sapRejectConfirm: Reject account "{{name}}"? The owner gets an email notification. The owner will not be able to access.
sapStatusChangedEmail: Status changed — email sent to owner
accPwMin: New password must be at least 6 characters.
accPwMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
onbStepProfileDesc: Name, location and hours — visible to guests
onbStepTemplateDesc: Choose the color and style of the guest menu
onbStepCategoryDesc: Add a menu category (e.g. Starters, Pizza...)
onbStepItemDesc: Add your first dish or drink to the menu
onbStepQrDesc: Your menu is ready — share it with guests
onbScanDesc: Guests can scan the QR code or open the direct link:
onbQrNote: You'll find a detailed printable QR code in the menu under the QR code section.
hobRoomtypeDesc: E.g. Standard, Deluxe — name, price and capacity
hobRoomsDesc: Add specific rooms for this type
hobDoneDesc: The hotel is ready to operate
hobDoneDescFull: You created a room type{{rooms}}. Continue to the Front Desk for reservations and check-in.
tbBetaRest: — all modules are currently free for the features you use.
tbSuspended: ⚠️ Account suspended due to a failed payment.
tbExpired: ⏰ The trial period has expired. Upgrade to Pro to keep using all features.
bsProDesc: Your restaurant now has access to all Pro features. Thank you for your trust!
bsErrorDesc: If you completed the payment, your plan will be updated soon. Contact us at support@restby.me if the issue persists.
npBoardSub: Notices for your staff (visible in the Staff portal)
npBoardInfo: Notices visible to your staff in the Staff portal.
npNoNotices: No notices. Add the first one for your staff to see in the portal.
spFromOwner: Support is available from the owner account.
spSub: Questions and help from the rest.by.me team
spNoMessages: You have no messages. Open a new one if you need help.
fqSub: Frequently asked questions about using the platform
bfrQuestionPh: E.g. Do you have a pool?
sapTranslateConfirm: Translate all content (menu + categories) for "{{name}}" into 6 languages?
sapTranslateAllConfirm: Translate content of ALL tenants ({{count}}) into 6 languages? This may take a while.
amTransSub: AI translates the name and description automatically. Correct an individual language here — your version gets locked and AI won’t change it. Clear a field and save to restore the AI translation.
amTransPageHint: 🌐 Next to each item, manually correct the AI translations into other languages.
amTransAutoNote: AI automatically translates the name and description into the other languages. Fine-tune individually via 🌐 in the item list.
amWaiterMsgNote: Enter only in Montenegrin — AI translates to other languages for guests.
descRental: Short-term rentals — assets, calendar and bookings.
vertRentalDesc: Short-term rentals: apartments, villas and studios — calendar, pricing, guest registration.
vertRentalSub: Assets across multiple locations, one account.
rdIntro: Rental overview — assets, occupancy and bookings in one place.
rdAssetsDesc: Apartments, villas and studios with location, amenities and photos.
rdCalendarDesc: Occupancy of all assets and new bookings.
rdBookingsDesc: Direct bookings, deposits and guest registration.
rdBuilding: The rentals module is under development — surfaces are being enabled gradually.
raSubtitle: Apartments, villas and studios — basics, pricing and amenities.
raNone: No assets yet. Add your first one.
raDeleteErr: Cannot delete — it likely has bookings. Set status to "Archived".
rsSubtitle: Tourist tax, fiscal mode and self check-in instructions.
rsChildExemptHint: Applied once guest ages are collected (registration).
rsCheckinPlaceholder: Key box code, address, arrival directions…
rsFiscalHint: Turn off if the tenant is not subject to fiscalization.
rpSubtitle: Seasonal prices per asset (override the base price).
rpNone: No seasonal prices — the base price applies.
rbSubtitle: Direct bookings per asset — price is calculated automatically.
rbPeriodRequired: Choose an asset and a valid period.
rbOverlap: These dates are already booked for this asset.
rcSubtitle: Occupancy of all assets by day.
poSubtitle: Orders to suppliers, receiving and automatic suggestions.
poAutoHint: Create drafts for items below minimum, grouped by supplier
poNeedLine: Add at least one item with a quantity.
stSubtitle: Count actual stock levels and differences versus the records.
stCreateHint: The system snapshots the current quantity of all (or the selected category) items.
stNoItems: No items in this stock take.
stCloseConfirm: Close the stock take? Stock levels will be aligned to the counted values and the stock take can no longer be changed.
taskbarPlaceholder: What would you like to do?
saDashSub: Configure the shortcuts users see in the “What would you like to do?” bar. The list is the same for all tenants; shown by vertical/permission/add-on.
saDashTranslateHint: Translate task labels into all languages
saDashEmpty: No tasks yet. Add the first one.
checklistAllDoneText: Great — you've set up the essentials. You can hide this card.
hwCardDesc: What equipment you need and how to connect it
hwIntro: Overview of the equipment needed to run the app. The goal is for you to set everything up yourself, online — no installation and no technician on site. A detailed guide by venue size (printer, drawer, kitchen display, locks) is coming soon.
hwPoint1: Runs on any device with a modern web browser (phone, tablet, computer). You can „install” it as an app — no special software or local server.
hwPoint2: Fiscalization is software/online (certificate + tax service) — no hardware fiscal register needed.
hwPoint3: For receipt printing we recommend a thermal printer with „cloud” support — paired with a code from Settings, no installation; a USB printer also works on desktop.
hwPoint4: Take card payments via SoftPOS (tap on an Android phone) or a standalone terminal; online payments are already in the app.
hwSoon: 🚧 A detailed guide by tier (café → restaurant → hotel) with specific models and prices is in preparation. Until then, the most common hardware questions are in the knowledge base.
saDashStepsSub: Steps a new user sees on the home page until completed. “Detection” = status computed automatically; “Manual” = the user marks it themselves.
